display.purpose: Hero and masthead statements where publication voice matters.

headline.purpose: Major claims and section statements in dense layouts.

body.purpose: Long-form prose, ledes, cards, and UI explanations.

label.purpose: Schedule, category, state, and compact system labels.

components.name: Primary Editorial Button
components.description: Primary action for editorial and commercial surfaces.
components.css: .ds-button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--editorial-ink); border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.8rem 1.1rem; font-family: var(--font-jetbrains-mono), ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color var(--duration-base) var(--ease-standard), border-color var(--duration-base) var(--ease-standard), color var(--duration-base) var(--ease-standard); } .ds-button-primary { background: var(--editorial-ink); color: var(--editorial-paper); } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: var(--editorial-spruce); border-color: var(--editorial-spruce); } .ds-button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgb(var(--brand-primary)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Editorial Card
components.description: Compact content unit for sections, formats, offers, and related items.
components.html:
Hands-on and honest

We show the work as it happens, including mistakes, dead ends, and fixes.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid var(--editorial-hairline); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--editorial-paper-deep); padding: 1.2rem; color: var(--editorial-ink); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: var(--font-inter-tight), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0; margin: 0 0 0.55rem; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-card p { font-family: var(--font-inter-tight), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.94rem; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--editorial-ink-soft); margin: 0; }

components.name: Mono Label
components.description: Small status, category, or schedule label.
components.css: .ds-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: fit-content; font-family: var(--font-jetbrains-mono), ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--editorial-spruce); }

narrative.overview: Rawkode Academy uses a restrained editorial system for practical technical learning: paper-like surfaces, ink-led typography, sharp corners, ruled divisions, and a small set of earthy accents. The system should feel like a published engineering notebook with production evidence attached, not a generic developer landing page.
keyCharacteristics: Paper and ink surfaces with restrained accents.
Hairline borders and tonal layering before shadows.
Dense but readable layouts with deliberate rhythm.
Copy that names real technical work, tradeoffs, and boundaries.

rules.name: The Evidence Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent color marks a real state, category, or decision. Do not use accent color as decorative filler.

rules.name: The Display Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Large italic serif type is a signal. Use it for decisive moments, not as a site-wide reflex.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Borders and tonal shifts come before drop shadows. Shadows should clarify state or dark-mode layering, not decorate.

dos: Do use src/styles/global.css and uno.config.ts tokens before adding new one-off values.
Do keep body and lede text at strong contrast against Paper and Dark Base.
Do write commercial copy as bounded adoption help with clear exclusions.
donts: Don't make the site feel like slideware, a generic SaaS landing page, a paid-media publication, or a content farm.
Don't frame partnerships as outsourced DevRel, open-ended consulting retainers, lead generation, guaranteed coverage, or editorial placement.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, broad purple-blue gradients, oversized rounded cards, or decorative soft shadows.
